product_summary: Private MVP SaaS for running an Eval Debt Audit on one customer-facing AI workflow: create/select a project, import traces, generate and review eval assets, calibrate graders, optimize prompts, recommend routing/caching, and export an audit report.
current_stage: Repo audit complete; controlled Linear backlog setup in progress
top_blockers: Product surface mismatch between EvalOps Copilot requirements and active Evaller UI.
Required EvalOps MVP routes mostly redirect to /workspace.
Live production smoke is blocked by missing vendor/smoke credentials.
EvalOps and Evaller data models overlap without a documented boundary.
top_risks: Tenant isolation or storage policies not verified against the latest migrations.
Production AI/worker path not verified outside deterministic test mode.
Billing/commercial gates may imply readiness not approved by operator/counsel.
Large UI components make route restoration risky without small PR boundaries.
recommended_next_focus: Recover E2E suite against that contract.
Verify production-mode auth, RLS, Inngest, OpenAI, and storage on preview.
